subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Thy letter hath indeed attained unto Mine ears, and its words unto My glance, and the page hath been honored by the Hand of Him in Whose grasp it lay [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی قد فاز کتابک باصغائی و کلماته بلحاظی و الورقه تشرفت بید من بیده
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @wisdom [hikmat]
